title: hypolytrum humile
intro: Hypolytrum humile, also known as dwarf club-rush or rice paddy sedge, is a type of sedge plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and providing relief from gastrointestinal problems. In herbal preparations, Hypolytrum humile is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
